# Extração: 03-10X Statistics - Action Plan

- **Fonte:** 03-10X Statistics - Action Plan.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF
- **Páginas:** 0
- **Tamanho:** 3.42 MB

---

This action plan is meant to supplement the Statistics Manual (10xdownload.com/s1) to
make sure you’re crystal clear on the actions to take in the correct order. When in doubt,
refer to the manual!
While this plan is designed to empower you to get stats up and running, when things get
too technical for you, remember that you can always hire someone to help. Good luck!
DECIDE WHICH STATS TO TRACK	STEP
1
Start by making a general list, taking into consideration all areas of your business...
After making your list, identify which stats are most important (your Key
Performance Indicators) and start tracking them immediately if possible.
• Business Statistics Flowchart (10xdownload.com/s4)
• Statistic Management Checklist (10xdownload.com/s5)
Recommended Resource:
Get Stats Reporting Regularly
And Start Using Them to Grow!
YOUR GOAL
STATISTICS ACTION PLAN
Leads (opt-ins, qualified leads, etc)
Sales (conversions, revenue, etc)
Traffic (visitors, bounce rate, etc)
Advertising (ads pend, return, etc)
Social Media (engagements, etc)
Finance (expenses, profit, etc)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 6 --

SETUP AND INSTALL GOOGLE TAG MANAGER	STEP
3
Google Tag Manager allows you to more easily manage your web tracking. You’ll
need to install a piece of code on all of your websites, which you may hire
someone to do if needed.
• Data Configuration Flowchart (10xdownload/s3)
Recommended Resources:
• Google Tag Manager Video Tour (10xresource.com/s2)
• Statistic System Setup Checklist (10xdownload.com/s6)
• Google Tag Manager Course (10xresource.com/s5)
• Google Tag Manager Installation (10xresource.com/s12)
• Chrome Google Tag Assistant (10xresource.com/s11)
• Hire Someone on Fiverr (10xresource.com/fiverr)
Recommended Resources:
GET CLARITY ON SYSTEMS NEEDED	STEP
2
Every business will vary, but you need to get clear on where your statistical data is
coming from and how you will organize and access it. Generally speaking, you
will use some combination of the following…
Data Sources - Existing tools used such as CRM, bookkeeping, ad accounts, etc
Data Capturing - Web tracking tools such as Google Tag Manager and Analytics
Reporting Tool - Where you compile statistics, likely Google Sheets or Data Studio
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 6 --

SETUP AND CONFIGURE GOOGLE ANALYTICS	STEP
4
Google Analytics is your primary tool for collecting website statistics.
ADD ANALYTICS AND AD ACCOUNTS TO TAG MANAGER	STEP
5
Using your Google Tag Manager, you will now want to install your various data
sources on your websites. These are the most important ones, with the ad tags only
being needed if you advertise…
• Google Analytics Video Tour (10xresource.com/s3)
• Statistic System Setup Checklist (10xdownload.com/s6)
• Google Analytics Basics Course (10xresource.com/s6)
• Google Analytics Advanced Course (10xresource.com/s7)
Recommended Resources:
• Google Tag Manager Tour (10xresource.com/s2)
• Google Ad Conversion Setup (10xresource.com/s13)
• Meta Ad Pixel Tag Setup (10xresource.com/s14)
• Google Analytics Tag Setup (10xresource.com/s15)
Recommended Resources:
Google Analytics GA4 Configuration
Google Ads Conversion Tracking
Google Ads Remarketing
Google Conversion Linker
Meta Ad Pixel (Custom HTML)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 6 --

SET UP EVENTS AND CONVERSIONS	STEP
6
The next step is to identify the most critical events involved in tracking leads and
sales. These steps are referred to as events, and if an event is important, you will
designate it as a Conversion. Conversions are not only used in reporting, but can
also be utilized to optimize Google Ads.
• Conversion Statistics Flowchart (10xdownload.com/s2)
• Google Analytics Video Tour (10xresource.com/s3)
• Recommended Event Details (10xresource.com/s13)
Recommended Resources:
IMPLEMENT UTM TRACKING (OPTIONAL)	STEP
7
If you send significant traffic from multiple sources, then you will want to use
special UTM tracking links. These links will help allow you to have clarity on what
traffic source, campaign, content, etc turns into leads and sales.
• Google UTM Video Tour (10xresource.com/s17)
• Google UTM Link Builder (10xresource.com/s18)
• Google UTM Documentation (10xresource.com/s19)
Recommended Resources:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 6 --

SETUP AND CONFIGURE STAT DASHBOARDS	STEP
8
When it comes to compiling and displaying your stats reporting, recommend
2 options…
• Google Sheets Video Tour (10xresource.com/s1)
• Google Sheets Course (10xresource.com/s8)
• Google Data Studio Video Tour (10xresource.com/s4)
• Google Data Studio Course (10xresource.com/s9)
Recommended Resources:
REVIEW REGULARLY AND GROW YOUR BUSINESS!	STEP
9
Once you have reports being created, it is time to use your stats to grow!
Establish a regular routine to not just review, but actually use the data to make
adjustments and optimize your results!
• Statistic Management Checklist (10xdownload.com/s5)
Recommended Resource:
A. Google Sheets - More simple, recommended if you compile stats manually
B. Google Data Studio - More advanced, recommended to automated reporting
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
